I need to get in the hot water soon and wash away this fatigue... Ugh, my joints are
creaking... And I have work again tomorrow, but like this...

Hah... But I'm getting tired of always bathing with just you. If there were any cute
girls in that mixed bath over there, I'd go...

\n[1], you've been looking kinda pale lately, you know? Here, make sure you take a
proper bath and rest up! An adventurer's body is their capital, right?

Well, you see... I wish there were at least some younger girls in the mixed bath...
Last time I went, it was all old ladies, and I've had enough of that...

You're an excellent adventurer, \n[1]-kun, so please take good care of your health,
okay? Your strength can be of use to everyone...
